verses.text: Kam nemin dawn'na in hehna damsak a, kam khauh in hehna piangsak hi
Mipilte in pilna thu gen a, mihaite in haina thu gen hi
Topa' mit in mun khempeuh mu a, misia, mipha, hong encik kim hi
Kam khum in nuntakna piangsak a, kam sia in lung gimsak hi
A pa' hilhna a ngai nuamlote mihai hi a, hilhna a mang nuamte mipil ahi hi
Thuman mite' neihsa kip a, migilote' hauhna in lungkham a guan' hi
Mipilte' kampauna in pilna khangsak a, mihaite' lungsimah thumanlohna bek om hi
Topa in migilote' biakpiakna kihhuai sa a, thuman mite' thungetna-ah lungdam hi
Topa in migilote' gamtatna kihhuai sa a, thuman a deih mite a it hi
A gamta khial mite nakpi takin kithuhilh a, thukihilhna a mang nuamlote in sihna thuak ding uh hi
Sihna gamsungah a omte nangawn Pasian in mu ahih leh, mihingte' ngaihsutna tel muhzaw kan ding hilo ahi hiam
A kihisak mite in kithuhilhna ngai nuamlo uh a, mipilte kiangah thu dong ngeilo uh hi
Lungdamna in maitaisak a, lungkhamna in maigumsak hi
Thungaihsun theite in pilna zong uh a, mihaite ahih leh a theihlohna uh tawh lungkim uh hi
Mizawngte lungkham tawntung uh a, a lungdam mite in nuntak nuamsa mahmah uh hi
Hau napi-in lungkham sangin zawng napi-in Topa zahtakna hoihzaw tham hi
Kitawngtawng kawmin sameh limpen nekna sangin ki-it diamdiamin anteh meh nek hoihzaw hi
Lungtomna in kitotna piangsak a, lungduaina in kilemna piangsak hi
Mi thadahte in mun khempeuhah haksatna tuak a, mi thumante in haksatna tuak khalo hi
Ta pilte in a pa lungdamsak a, ta haite bek in a nu simmawh hi
Mihaite in a hai mah uh lungdampih a, mipilte ahih leh a manin gamta uh hi
Lim ngaihsut loin sepna tawh bangmah piang zolo a, limtakin geelna tawh ma kitun'zo bek hi
A hun mahin dawn'pah theihna lungkimhuai a, a kilawm kammal tawh dawn'pah theihna hoihzaw kan hi
Mipilte in nuntakna lampi zuito uh a, sihna lampi zuisuk lo uh hi
Topa in mi kiphasakte' inn phelkhiatsak a, meigongte' neihsa hutpih hi
Topa in migilote' ngaihsutna kihhuaisa a, midikte' kampaunate hoih a sa hi
A manloin sum ngahna in innsung lungkhamsak a, sumgolh a deihlote a nuntak sauvei nuam hi
Mihoihte in a kampau ding ngaihsun phot a, migilote' paupakna pen thusia tawh kizom hi
Topa in midikte' thungetna ngai a, migilote' thungetna thudonlo hi
Maitaina in lung nuamsak a, thuhoih zakna in lung damsak hi
Kithuhilhna zuih theihna pen mipilte' lakah kihel theihna ahi hi
Kihilh ding a utlote amahmah a kisusia hi a, kithuhilh ding a utte pil semsem ding hi
Topa zahtakna pen pilna mah hi pah a, kiniamkhiatna in pahtawina hong ngahsak hi.
